signal: System stress ELEVATED → HIGH with zero bullish asset class scores: consumer confidence at GFC-trough, Hormuz disruption embedding $15–20 oil premium, and private credit gate risk the most underpriced systemic trigger in the model.

delta_strip.title: Hormuz Zero Commercial Crossings — Binary Oil Risk
delta_strip.one_line: Zero AIS crossings March 14; ~400 vessels holding; $15–20/bbl premium; 30-day extension triggers Brent $120–150.

delta_strip.title: Consumer Confidence at GFC Trough — 55.5
delta_strip.one_line: UMich 55.5 statistically indistinguishable from November 2008 trough (55.3) — a WARNING flag.

delta_strip.title: Private Credit Gate Risk — 40% Probability by Q2 End
delta_strip.one_line: Blackstone/Blue Owl/BlackRock approaching 5% gate threshold; Morgan Stanley projects defaults rising 5.6% → 8%.

delta_strip.title: Real M2 Policy Trap — Q3 2026 Negative Trigger
delta_strip.one_line: Real M2 +1.78% and narrowing; projected negative Q3 2026; Fed in structural policy trap on all three paths.

delta_strip.title: Zero Bullish Asset Class Scores — System Average -0.559
delta_strip.one_line: All 8 asset classes negative; system average -0.559; stagflation regime confirmed at HIGH conviction.

signal: Liberation Day tariffs confirm worst-case trade scenario (effective rate 26.2%, highest since Smoot-Hawley); private credit gate events trigger at Ares and Apollo; consumer confidence breaks below GFC trough to 53.3.

delta_strip.title: Liberation Day: Reciprocal Tariffs on All Countries
delta_strip.one_line: 10%+ on all trading partners (China 34%, EU 20%, Japan 24%); avg effective rate 26.2% — highest since Smoot-Hawley 1930.

delta_strip.title: Private Credit Gate Events Confirmed: Ares, Apollo, BCRED
delta_strip.one_line: Ares restricted redemptions to 5% (requests hit 11.6%); Apollo similar; Blackstone BCRED first monthly loss in 3 years — first liquidity test at scale.

delta_strip.title: Consumer Confidence 53.3 — Below GFC Trough
delta_strip.one_line: Final March reading revised to 53.3 — below November 2008 GFC trough (55.3). Inflation expectations unmooring.

delta_strip.title: Hormuz: Brent Peaked $126/bbl, Flows at 25% of Normal
delta_strip.one_line: JPMorgan: Hormuz flows ~4M bpd vs normal 16M. Gulf producers cutting 10M bpd. EIA Q2 2026 avg $91/bbl.

delta_strip.title: Fed Policy Trap Deepens: Zero Cuts Now Priced for 2026
delta_strip.one_line: Market reversed from 2 cuts to 0 cuts priced by year-end. Fed held 3.50–3.75%, upgraded PCE forecast to 2.7%.
